input_dict.question: Hail Flutie was a call made at the game with which managing editor at Vegas Stats and Information Network calling the action?
input_dict.target_summary: The Hail Flutie game was televised nationally by CBS, with Brent Musburger listed among the commentators (alongside Ara Parseghian and Pat Haden). Brent Woody Musburger is an American sportscaster who serves as lead broadcaster and managing editor at Vegas Stats & Information Network (VSiN).
input_dict.candidate_summary: The Hail Flutie game was televised nationally by CBS, with Brent Musburger listed among the commentators (alongside Ara Parseghian and Pat Haden). Brent Woody Musburger is an American sportscaster who serves as lead broadcaster and managing editor at Vegas Stats & Information Network (VSiN).
